title: Threshold Segmentation
description: Label voxels whose intensity falls between two thresholds. Emits a .seg.nrrd labelmap whose segment name and RGB color travel inside the file. Backed by ITK.

parameters.title: Input Volume
parameters.help: Input volume (DICOM, NIfTI, NRRD, MHA, etc.)

outputs.title: Output Labelmap
outputs.help: Binary labelmap (.seg.nrrd) with the segment's embedded name and color.
